mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kpi_data_detail (create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted, organization_id, kpi_data_id, company_name, street, data_date, value) VALUES
(#{item.createTime}, #{item.createId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateId}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.organizationId}, #{item.kpiDataId}, #{item.companyName}, #{item.street}, #{item.dataDate}, #{item.value})
